summary: 0.6.48 makes the shared progress slider navigate image playlists by index and reflect image playlist position as live state.
operatorSignals: The next requested step after the A-B loop control was image slider navigation and state.
The goal was to keep this extension narrow and not bundle slideshow, input remaps, or new scrub-preview behavior into it.
actionsTaken: Added an image-specific normalized seek path that maps slider position to playlist index.
Updated runtime and demo3 slider readback to use a shared presentation-normalized value for images as well as videos.
Left the existing CUA stick image stepping and video transport behavior untouched.
nonGoals: No slideshow behavior in this slice.
No right-stick volume, builder layout, or gaze behavior changes in this slice.
